title: Internal Server Error
detail:
(sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.IntegrityError) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions.ForeignKeyViolationError'>: insert or update on table "voter_interactions" violates foreign key constraint "voter_interactions_voter_id_fkey"
DETAIL:  Key (voter_id)=(3a5a8db0-67a2-4fe4-9953-d540d281232b) is not present in table "voters".
[SQL: INSERT INTO voter_interactions (id, campaign_id, voter_id, type, payload, created_by, created_at) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, $3::UUID, $4, $5::JSONB, $6::VARCHAR, $7::TIMESTAMP WITHOUT TIME ZONE)]
[parameters: (UUID('1b156563-831f-42b1-b86e-33fcdaddedcb'), UUID('06d710c8-32ce-44ae-bbab-7fcc72aab248'), UUID('3a5a8db0-67a2-4fe4-9953-d540d281232b'), 'NOTE', '{"note": "offline for deleted voter"}', '367278371970744389', datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 5, 21, 43, 55, 187920))]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/gkpj)
